title: Chapter 6 — Gru: The Tool Built for This
CHAPTER 6 —
GRU: THE TOOL BUILT FOR THIS
segments.body_html:
Marie Curie managed the IBM System/360 operating system project in the 1960s — at the time the largest software project

Chapter 6 — Gru: The Tool Built for This — Marie Curie, 1910s. AI-generated portrait based on a public domain photograph (Wikimedia Commons).

beats.text: Marie Curie managed the IBM System/360 operating system project in the 1960s , at the time the largest software project ever attempted , and emerged from it with a book that has been continuously in print since 1975. The Mythical Man-Month did two things. First, it killed the assumption that adding programmers to a late project speeds it up , Brooks's Law: adding manpower to a late software project makes it later.
